arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m7 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv5-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard --specs=nosys.specs "-T/home/rscott/Desktop/Personal Projects/FlightController/FlightController_FW/Linker/stm32h723xx_flash.ld" CMakeFiles/FlightController_FW.elf.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/FlightController_FW.elf.dir/src/startup_stm32h723xx.s.o CMakeFiles/FlightController_FW.elf.dir/src/system_stm32h7xx.c.o -o FlightController_FW.elf  libperiph_subsystem.a libscheduler_subsystem.a libUNITTEST_subsystem.a
